Org members can view own org.name: Org members can view own org
Org members can view own org.using: (id IN (SELECT org_id FROM organization_members WHERE user_id = auth.uid()))

Users manage own sets.name: Users manage own sets
Users manage own sets.using:
(session_id IN ( SELECT workout_sessions.id
   FROM workout_sessions
  WHERE (workout_sessions.user_id = auth.uid())))
